vampire_lord_ev_001.title: Intact Reserves
vampire_lord_ev_001.body: A shipment arrives cold and complete. For once, nothing leaks, nothing is missing.

vampire_lord_ev_002.title: Oath of the Elders
vampire_lord_ev_002.body: The clan elders swear to hold the line. The corridors regain a bit of order.

vampire_lord_ev_003.title: Night Without a Trail
vampire_lord_ev_003.body: The hunters follow a false lead far from the lair. The city breathes a little easier.

vampire_lord_ev_004.title: Quiet Cult
vampire_lord_ev_004.body: The vampiric secret recruits in silence. Little noise, a lot of loyalty.

vampire_lord_ev_005.title: Spoiled Stock
vampire_lord_ev_005.body: A batch of blood spoils faster than expected. The smell alone is enough to ruin the night.

vampire_lord_ev_006.title: Local Hunt
vampire_lord_ev_006.body: A neighborhood search party is being organized. Lamps, radios, and dogs are getting closer.

vampire_lord_ev_007.title: Crypt Quarrel
vampire_lord_ev_007.body: Two bloodlines are fighting over an old chamber. The clan loses time and patience.

vampire_lord_ev_008.title: Badly Timed Flash
vampire_lord_ev_008.body: A nighttime photo comes out a little too well. Curious minds start asking the right questions.

vampire_lord_ev_009.title: Broken Trail
vampire_lord_ev_009.body: A human informant sends the hunters toward another tunnel. Their night is wasted.

vampire_lord_ev_010.title: Calm Council
vampire_lord_ev_010.body: The council ends without shouting or threats. It is almost a miracle.

vampire_lord_ev_011.title: Talkative Forum
vampire_lord_ev_011.body: Humans are compiling precise rumors. The vampiric secret becomes less secret.

vampire_lord_ev_012.title: Closed Ritual
vampire_lord_ev_012.body: A well-run ritual binds the faithful together. No one talks too much, everyone listens.

vampire_lord_ev_013.title: Missing Bags
vampire_lord_ev_013.body: Blood bags disappear from the secondary stock. Someone is drinking or reselling before you do.

vampire_lord_ev_014.title: Loyal Recruits
vampire_lord_ev_014.body: A few young vampires finally fall in line with your rules. The lair grows more disciplined.

vampire_lord_ev_015.title: Complicit Clinic
vampire_lord_ev_015.body: A small reliable source opens up in the city. The blood arrives clean and steady.

vampire_lord_ev_016.title: Silver on the Thresholds
vampire_lord_ev_016.body: Silver marks appear near the entrances. Someone is testing the defenses.

vampire_lord_ev_017.title: Wall of the Faithful
vampire_lord_ev_017.body: The vampiric secret spreads subtle signs across the city. The loyal recognize each other quickly.

vampire_lord_ev_018.title: Old Grudge
vampire_lord_ev_018.body: An old debt resurfaces in the council. The clan starts eyeing itself with suspicion again.

vampire_lord_ev_019.title: False UV Alert
vampire_lord_ev_019.body: A false signal draws the hunters away from your area. They lose time, you gain the night.

vampire_lord_ev_020.title: Cut Delivery
vampire_lord_ev_020.body: The backup truck does not make it through. Reserves drop before dawn.

vampire_lord_ev_021.title: Spotted Face
vampire_lord_ev_021.body: A face linked to the lair is circulating in a closed group. The veil tears a little.

vampire_lord_ev_022.title: Clan Vigil
vampire_lord_ev_022.body: A calm night spent together tightens the bonds. The clan follows your orders more closely.

vampire_lord_ev_023.title: Night Bank
vampire_lord_ev_023.body: A discreet deal with a nocturnal network supplies the cellars. Stocks finally rise again.

vampire_lord_ev_024.title: Methodical Huntress
vampire_lord_ev_024.body: A very serious huntress maps your habits. She moves without noise and without mistakes.

vampire_lord_ev_025.title: Contested Order
vampire_lord_ev_025.body: Your rules are judged too harsh by part of the clan. The whispers return.

vampire_lord_ev_026.title: Distracted Dog
vampire_lord_ev_026.body: The hunters' dog is led onto another trail. Their team searches in the wrong place.

vampire_lord_ev_027.title: Cold Reserve
vampire_lord_ev_027.body: The cellars hold steady and the stock remains perfect. A night like this almost deserves a smile.

vampire_lord_ev_028.title: Nervous Witness
vampire_lord_ev_028.body: A human witness talks too fast to too many people. The vampiric secret takes a hit.

vampire_lord_ev_029.title: Postponed Duel
vampire_lord_ev_029.body: A duel of pride is still poisoning the lair. The clan divides instead of hunting.

vampire_lord_ev_030.title: Silence of the Faithful
vampire_lord_ev_030.body: The faithful obey and stay quiet. Nothing leaks, nothing sticks out.
